title: Jennie Formby, Labour’s former general secretary, says she has joined Greens
description: Exclusive: Formby, an ally of Jeremy Corbyn who quit role in 2020, says Labour is now ‘in hock to corporate sponsors’
content:
A former Labour general secretary has defected to the Green party, in the latest sign that allies of Jeremy Corbyn are moving in large numbers to Zack Polanski’s party.
Jennie Formby, who managed the Labour party from 2018 to 2020, told the Guardian ... [3840 chars]

title: Families living in properties 'unfit for human habitation'
description: A cross-party report has called for safer conditions for the record number of families living in temporary accommodation.
content:
"I just need enough space for my family."
Nestere Yehdego, 31, his wife and their two daughters aged four and one are squashed together in a one-bedroom flat in Slough.
He says the cramped conditions have made life extremely difficult for his family.... [4153 chars]

title: Ban 'forever chemicals' in uniforms and frying pans, MPs urge
description: School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products that should stop using chemicals called PFAS, MPs say.
content:
School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products that are treated with a group of chemicals, called PFAS, to make them stain and water resistant.
But there is growing concern about the long-term environmental and health impacts of... [4322 chars]

title: City firms bank on ‘savvy’ advertising campaign to push Brits towards investing
description: The campaign, fronted by a CGI squirrel, is part of government initiative to boost financial risk taking, amid fears UK growth is being stymied
content:
City firms are pinning their hopes on a government-endorsed advertising blitz fronted by a finance “savvy” CGI squirrel to encourage cautious British savers to shift out of cash and start investing.
The long-awaited retail investment campaign, which ... [4042 chars]

title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be re-opened due to ceasefire breaches
description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.
content:
Iran's chief negotiator in talks with the US said it is "not possible" for the Strait of Hormuz to be opened due to "the blatant violations of the ceasefire" by the US and Israel.
